titleStmt.title: SII 9.694: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 694. (A.R. No. 434 of 1928.) ON A SLAB LYING IN THE BACK-YARD OF THE HOUSE OF ANANDAKRISHNA AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1532 (1530), Kīlaka, Chaitra, śu. 1, corresponding to A.D. 1608 March 7, Monday, in the reign of Veṅkaṭapatirāya. It records that Ajji-Nāraṇaseṭṭi, son of Ajji-Nārasiṁhaseṭṭi, caused the construction of a maṭha in the Paḍuvakēri of Basrūr and endowed it with lands, and money-grants yielding annual interest.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . nama(ḥ)stuṁgaśira(ḥ)ścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . tra
yilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayādbhudayaśālivāhanaśaka
varuṣa 1532 neya kīlakasaṁvatsarada caitra śu 1 lu veṁkaṭapatirāyarū vijayanagariya siṁ
hāsanadalu sakalasāṁbrājyavanu pratipālisuva kāladalu Ajinārusiṁhaśeṭṭiyara maga toḷaha
ra baḷiya Ajjināraṇaseṭiyaru tānu paḍuvakēriyalū kaṭisida maṭhada dharmake biṭa bāḷa vivara kōragiya
voḷage Ardhanūrali nāraṇaseṭiya Aḷiya nāraṇahgeḍe kayyali Ardha Urattiyāgi
māḍikoṁḍa bāḷa vivara mūḍalu tirumasuṁḍilana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu tirumasuṁḍilana
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yī gaḍiyavoḷage kaṭi nagari bayala mu 5 yidake koṭṭaArdhava
raha ga 78 �yo bāḷige gēṇi saṁṇa mu 15 bedige ga 1 mataṁ kōragi voḷage maṁjanabeṭanali nāra
ṇaseṭṭiyaru badamūlada bāḷa vivara mane mallagade makiya catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu
hoṁnapaṁṇane gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu harida kōḍiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuva
lu nāraṇahgeḍeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu hoṁnapaṁṇana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu nā
ku catusīmeyiṁdoḷagaṇa mane kaṇa haṭi bāvi mallagade maki Anuba saha nāgaṁḍugada
lu mu 8 ceṁmuḻagade bayala vivara muḍalu harida hoḷeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu du
gamacāṇuki gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yī gaḍivoḷage mu 1 konebāgilagade paḍuvaḍi vivara mū
ḍalā tirumasuṁḍilana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu nāraṇahgeḍeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ muḍa
lu mu ... 0 muruvanagadeya vivara muḍalu tirumasuṁḍilana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍavalu ti
rumasuṁḍilana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ muḍalu mu 4 hōda nālku mekke mu . 0 hesavinagade vivara mu
ḍalu tirumasuṁḍilana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu nāraṇahgeḍe gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mu
ḍalu mu 2 Aṁtu bayalu ¥ 2 maretāru saha mu 9 . yidake kaṭida gēṇi saṁṇa muḍi 30 yidake teru
bēḍigeyiṁda ga haḍi hakalu saha 5 mataṁ maṁjanabeṭinali nāraṇaseṭiya Aḷi
ya nāraṇahgeḍe keya Aruvāravāgi māḍikoṁḍa bāḷu meṭukalla gadeya vivara mūḍalu ba
yidana gaḍi gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu dēvasvada gadeyiṁda muḍalu bayala mu
ḍi 1 guḷiyagadeya vivara muḍalu harida bacaliṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu �yosarasuṁ
ḍilana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ muḍalu mu 3 nālvattaneya vivara muḍalu �yosarasuṁḍilana gade
yiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu harida bacaliṁdaṁ muḍalu mu 1 kaḷiya bayala gade
gaḍiya vivara muḍalu kartana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu gaṇapaṇana gaḍiyiṁdaṁmūḍa
lu mu 1 . keḷanālvattāne gaḍi vivara muḍalu kartana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu tirumasuṁḍilana
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ muḍalu mu 2 haḍuvaḷa nālvatāne vivara muḍalu kartana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu
�yosarasuṁḍilana gaḍiyiṁda muḍalu mu 1 cekaḍiya gadeya vivara muḍalu kartana ga
ḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu beṁmajāṇiya gaḍiyiṁda mūḍalu mu 1 ... koḷakeya gade
vivara muḍalu kōṭiliṁgana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu tiṁmapaseṭi gaḍiyiṁdaṁ muḍa
lu mu 1 . naḍuvinagade tōṭadagade vivara muḍalu harida bacaliṁdaṁ pa
ḍuvalu paḍavalu yīsarasuṁḍilana gaḍiyiṁda muḍalu bayala mu 2 ... Adaba
yalu mu 15 . yidakoppida mettina mane mallagadeya catusīmeya vivara mu
ḍalu hakaliṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu bacaliṁdaṁ muḍalu �yo gaḍiyoḷaguḷa mallagade mu 4
mane kaḷa bāvi haṭi koṭige maneya mūḍagōṁṭi haḍi hakala Anuba sanuba saha mattaṁ
kuṁbara hakala vivara muḍalu kōṭiyaṁṇana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu paḍuvalu heḷabana
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ muḍalu �yo gaḍiyoḷaguḷa hakalu maki mane Aḍi saha Ubhayaṁ muḍi 19 . yi
dake koṭa Ardhavaraha ga 130 yidake naḍisuva Akki teru bēḍige Anāyava kaḷadu koḍuva
Akki saṁṇa mu 39 Ajaseṭaṇaseṭiyaru paḍuvakēriyali kaṭisida maṭake kartana Ube
yadiṁda naḍusuva Aḷāra Aṁtu bage murake teru bēḍige dēvasva kaḷadu Aki saṁṇamuḍi
71 ke nityacatra dinavoṁdake Arumaṁdi lekadali varuśavoṁdake Aki saṁṇa muḍi 60
lakṣuminārāyaṇadēvara bayigana nēvēdake Aki saṁṇamuḍi 3 paruva pāḍyada ra
ṁgapūjege Aki saṁṇa mu 3 Aṁtu mu 67 . haḷiye muḍi 3 . yanu teru bēḍige sāla vivara
biṭadumaṁ kaḷiyaṁṇage biṭa sarvasvada vivara kāḷavaradoḷage nārubālaseṭi saṁtāna
ṁ sankaliṁga Ucana kayali Arvārava māḍikoṁḍa sarvasvada vivara muḍalu daba
ḍeya murāriseṭiya muru muḍi gadeya gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu naṁdi
bāleseṭitiya Arvatāne gade .
Digital edition of SII 9.694 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
